title: Maniyar hydel project: KSEB’s takeover bid put on hold
description: Recently, govt. asked KSEB to take over the 12 MW unit since the pact with Carborundum had ended in December 2024. On April 29, signages proclaiming ‘KSEB property’ were planted on the unit premises, prompting criticism from the company. On Saturday, the govt. decides to freeze the move till a panel decides on the company’s application to extend the pact.
